technical_specs.parameter: Net weight when empty/filled with water

source_refs.source_quote: Net weight when empty/filled with water kg 30/31
Dimensions (height/width/depth) mm 700/395/285 700/395/285 700/395/285
The appliance expansion vessel is pre-charged to 1.0 bar.
Therefore, the minimum cold fill pressure is 1.0 bar.
The vessel is suitable for correct operation for system capacities up to 100 litres.
The pressure relief valve is set at 3 bar
The pressure relief discharge pipe should be not less than 15 mm diameter
The condensate outlet will accept 21.5 mm (3/4 in) plastic overflow pipe.
The pipe should be a minimum of 21.5 mm diameter

technical_specs.parameter: Condensate pipe diameter (internal runs > 3m or cold areas)

source_refs.source_quote: Internal runs greater than 3 metres or runs in cold areas should use 32 mm waste pipe.
External runs MUST be a MINIMUM of 32 mm and fully insulated with ma-terial suitable for external use.
Side Clearance 2.5 mm
Clearance above 178 mm
Clearance below 150 mm
450 (for servicing.

fault_codes.description: Outdoor temperature sensor expected but not detected
possible_causes: Outdoor sensor is not connected correctly

source_refs.source_quote: A.00 .34 Outdoor temperature sensor expected but not detected OUTDOOR SENSOR NOT DETECTED Connect the outdoor sensor Outdoor sensor is not connected correctly

fault_codes.description: Low water pressure
manufacturer_steps: Check the system pressure and restore it
Check the pressure of the expansion vessel
Check for any system / boiler leaks

source_refs.source_quote: A.02 .06 Low water pressure Check the system pressure and restore it Check the pressure of the expansion vessel Check for any system / boiler leaks

fault_codes.description: OBD error
manufacturer_steps: Re-enter the CN1 and CN2 values, check the information shown on the data plate

source_refs.source_quote: A.02 .18 OBD error CONFIGURATION ERROR Re-enter the CN1 and CN2 values, check the information shown on the data plate

fault_codes.description: Functional device disconnected
manufacturer_steps: Check the connection and the connectors

source_refs.source_quote: A.02 .36 Functional device disconnected SCB BOARD NOT DETECTED Check the connection and the connectors Faulty SCB, replace the board

fault_codes.description: Passive functional device disconnected
manufacturer_steps: Check the connection and the connectors

source_refs.source_quote: A.02 .37 Passive functional device disconnected SCB BOARD NOT DETECTED Check the connection and the connectors Faulty SCB, replace the board

fault_codes.description: Connection error

source_refs.source_quote: A.02 .45 Connection error SCB BOARD NOT DETECTED Carry out the auto-detect function

source_refs.source_quote: A.02 .46 Device priority error SCB BOARD NOT DETECTED Carry out the auto-detect function

fault_codes.description: Unit function configuration error

source_refs.source_quote: A.02 .48 Unit function configuration error SCB BOARD NOT DETECTED Carry out the auto-detect function

fault_codes.description: Failed node initialisation

source_refs.source_quote: A.02 .49 Failed node initialisation SCB BOARD NOT DETECTED Carry out the auto-detect function

fault_codes.description: Open Therm bus power supply error

source_refs.source_quote: A.02 .54 Open Therm bus power supply error Replace the CU-GH board

fault_codes.description: Incorrect or missing serial number

source_refs.source_quote: A.02 .55 Incorrect or missing serial number Replace the CU-GH board

source_refs.source_quote: H.00 .42 Pressure sensor open/faulty RESET PROCEDURE IN PROGRESS No action required

fault_codes.description: Temporary communication failure between gas valve and boiler PCB.

source_refs.source_quote: H.01 .00 Temporary communication failure between gas valve and boiler PCB. MAIN PCB ERROR Configure CN1/CN2 Replace the main PCB

fault_codes.description: Maximum temperature difference value between flow and return reached.
manufacturer_steps: Check the cleanliness of the exchanger
Check the operation of the temperature sensors
Check the connection of the temperature sensors

source_refs.source_quote: H.01 .05 Maximum temperature difference value between flow and return reached. INSUFFICIENT CIRCULATION Check the boiler/installation circulation Activate a manual venting cycle Check the installation pressure OTHER CAUSES Check the cleanliness of the exchanger Check the operation of the temperature sensors Check the connection of the temperature sensors

Check the operation of the temperature sensors

INSUFFICIENT CIRCULATION Check the boiler/installation circulation Activate a manual venting cycle Check the installation pressure OTHER CAUSES Check the cleanliness of the exchanger Check the operation of the temperature sensors Check the temperature sensor connection

fault_codes.description: Maximum flow temperature value reached.

source_refs.source_quote: H.01 .14 Maximum flow temperature value reached. INSUFFICIENT CIRCULATION Check the boiler/installation circulation Activate a manual venting cycle

fault_codes.description: Maximum safe temperature value reached
manufacturer_steps: Check the pressure in the installation
Switch on the manual degassing function
Check that the pump is working
Check the circulation in the boiler/installation
Check that the safety thermostat is working correctly
